articles.title: Morgan Stanley MSBT ETF nears launch after Amendment No. 4
articles.summary: Morgan Stanley filed Amendment No. 4 to its S‚ÄĎ1 for a spot Bitcoin ETF (proposed ticker: MSBT) that names custodians and a 0.14% fee ‚ÄĒ a clear step toward an NYSE Arca listing if the SEC signs off. The low fee and formal ops details intensify competition among US spot‚ÄĎBitcoin ETFs.

articles.title: Coinbase gets conditional approval for a U.S. national trust charter
articles.summary: The U.S. Office of the Comptroller of the Currency has given Coinbase conditional approval for a national trust charter, a big regulatory milestone that could expand how exchanges custody assets and offer banking‚ÄĎstyle services.

articles.title: JPMorgan: crypto flows tumbled to $11B in Q1 ‚ÄĒ one‚ÄĎthird of last year
articles.summary: JPMorgan analysts say digital‚ÄĎasset flows fell sharply in Q1 2026 to about $11 billion, signaling weaker institutional demand compared with the same quarter last year and raising questions on near‚ÄĎterm market momentum.

articles.title: Circle to launch cirBTC ‚ÄĒ a 1:1 wrapped Bitcoin for institutions
articles.summary: Circle announced cirBTC, a wrapped‚ÄĎBitcoin token on Ethereum backed 1:1 by BTC and aimed at OTC desks, market makers and lending platforms ‚ÄĒ putting Circle up against existing custodial wrapped BTC products.

articles.title: U.S. Treasury issues GENIUS Act NPRM ‚ÄĒ opens 60‚ÄĎday comment period on stablecoin state‚ÄĎpaths
articles.summary: On April 1 the U.S. Treasury published a notice of proposed rulemaking under the GENIUS Act that sets rules for when smaller stablecoin issuers may stay under state supervision. The move is the first major federal step to define how U.S. stablecoins will be regulated.

articles.title: Drift Protocol hit by a ~$285M exploit on Solana ‚ÄĒ DeFi fallout
articles.summary: Drift, a Solana‚ÄĎbased perpetuals DEX, suffered a roughly $270‚Äď$286 million exploit on April 1 that drained its vaults. The incident forced suspensions, spread losses across Solana DeFi, and prompted on‚ÄĎchain tracing and recovery outreach.

articles.title: Bybit publishes Proof‚ÄĎof‚ÄĎReserves report (Mar snapshot)
articles.summary: Bybit released its 32nd proof‚ÄĎof‚ÄĎreserves report showing overcollateralized positions across major assets ‚ÄĒ a transparency move that exchanges keep using to rebuild trust after earlier industry breaches.

articles.title: Offchain Labs: Ethereum L2s need 'responsive pricing' to scale
articles.summary: At EthCC, Offchain Labs argued that Ethereum layer‚ÄĎ2 networks must adopt responsive fee models to handle billions of users and reduce volatile fee swings ‚ÄĒ a key discussion for ETH scalability and L2 adoption.
